Aura — bundled
dist/aura.min.css + dist/aura.min.js

The whole design language in two files.

Every control below renders from the bundle alone — no source tree, no build step.

Overview Details Tabs, dialogs, menus, selects — all from the bundle. Reduced-motion aware, keyboard operable.

A glass dialog

Modal, focus-trapped, built on the elevation system — straight from the bundle.
